name: weather_agent
description: A weather agent that provides real-time current conditions and multi-day forecasts for any city worldwide using the Open-Meteo free API.

skills.name: Current Weather Lookup
skills.description: Get real-time temperature, humidity, wind speed, precipitation, and sky conditions for any city.
examples: What is the weather in Portland, Oregon right now?
How windy is it in Chicago today?

skills.name: Multi-Day Weather Forecast
skills.description: Get a daily forecast (highs, lows, precipitation, conditions) for 1–16 days ahead.
examples: Will it snow in Denver this week?
Give me a 7-day forecast for Miami
What's the weather going to be like in Paris over the next 3 days?
